name: Incorrect Execution-Assigned Permissions
description: While executing, the product sets the permissions of an object in a way that violates the intended permissions specified by the user. Runtime permission assignments override or contradict the user's intended security policy.
detection_pattern: Look for CONTROL nodes (runtime permission assignment, chmod, setACL calls during execution) that modify AUTH settings on STORAGE nodes (files, objects, resources) without a CONTROL mediator (user-intent validation, permission policy check, specification compliance verification) that ensures the assigned permissions match the user's intended security specifications.
